basic_details.job_title: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIM Lucknow is recruiting for 1 Academic Assistant position on a contractual basis.

important_dates.interview_date: To be communicated to shortlisted candidates

qualification.details: Manage and coordinate operations of the Research Seminar Series Office. Plan and execute logistics for research seminars. Liaise with internal departments and external stakeholders. Maintain records, reports, and digital presence of seminars. Assist the Chairperson in planning, scheduling, and other tasks.
qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate / MBA from a reputed institute/university in regular mode with minimum 60% marks.

how_to_apply: Interested candidates must fill the online application form using the link provided on the IIML website only: Apply here
Hard copies will not be accepted. For any technical issues, write to [email protected].
Only shortlisted candidates will be invited for a personal interview (online/offline).
important_instructions: This is a contractual position and does not guarantee regular employment. Incomplete or late applications will be rejected. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. IIM Lucknow reserves the right to shortlist candidates based on higher criteria.

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: IIM Lucknow has invited applications for the position of Academic Assistant in the Research Seminar Series Office. The role involves coordinating academic research seminars and working closely with faculty and stakeholders. Download IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIM Lucknow is recruiting for 1 Academic Assistant position on a contractual basis.

rows.indian_institute_of_management_lucknow_i: Initially 1 Year (extendable by 1 more year based on performance)
Rs. 40,000/- per month (consolidated) + HRA as per norms

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.date: To be communicated to shortlisted candidates

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant - Vacancy Details
IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Manage and coordinate operations of the Research Seminar Series Office. Plan and execute logistics for research seminars. Liaise with internal departments and external stakeholders. Maintain records, reports, and digital presence of seminars. Assist the Chairperson in planning, scheduling, and other tasks.

rows.details: Post Graduate / MBA from a reputed institute/university in regular mode with minimum 60% marks.
Not more than 35 years as on 1st July 2026.
Strong communication skills in Hindi & English, proficiency in MS Office and digital tools, prior experience in event management / academic administration, self-motivated and detail-oriented.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates must fill the online application form using the link provided on the IIML website only: Apply here Hard copies will not be accepted. For any technical issues, write to [email protected] . Only shortlisted candidates will be invited for a personal interview (online/offline).

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: This is a contractual position and does not guarantee regular employment. Incomplete or late applications will be rejected. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. IIM Lucknow reserves the right to shortlist candidates based on higher criteria.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application is 17th July 2026 (up to 05:00 PM).

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Academic Assistant at IIM Lucknow?
faq.answer: Consolidated monthly remuneration is Rs. 40,000/- plus HRA as per institute norms.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Research Seminar Series?
faq.answer: Post Graduate / MBA with minimum 60% marks from a reputed institute. Age not more than 35 years as on 1st July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the tenure of the Academic Assistant position at IIM Lucknow?
faq.answer: Initially 1 year, extendable by one more year based on performance.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Fill the online Google Form available on the IIML website. Hard copies are not accepted.

faq.question: Q6. What are the desirable skills for IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant?
faq.answer: Strong Hindi & English communication, MS Office proficiency, event management experience, and ability to work under deadlines.

faq.question: Q7. Is prior experience mandatory for IIM Lucknow Research Seminar Series Assistant?
faq.answer: It is desirable. Experience in event management or academic administration will be an advantage.

faq.question: Q8. Will there be an interview for IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant post?
faq.answer: Yes, only shortlisted candidates will be invited for a personal interview (online or offline).

faq.question: Q9. Is the IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is a contractual position initially for one year.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Refer to the official advertisement released by IIM Lucknow on their website.
